name: Reinsurance Group of America Incorporated 7.125% Fixed-Rate Reset Subordinated Debentures due 2052
summary: Reinsurance Group of America Incorporated 7.125% Fixed-Rate Reset Subordinated Debentures due 2052 are debt securities issued by Reinsurance Group of America. The debentures are subordinated to the company's senior debt obligations. Reinsurance Group of America is a leading global life and health reinsurance company.
